tool.name: Mac Running Apps
tool.description: List running applications on the Mac.

ai.systemPromptSection:
### mac_app_list
List running applications on the Mac.

**Format:**
```tool_request
{"tool": "mac_app_list", "query": ""}
```

**Returns:** List of apps with name, bundleIdentifier, pid, isActive, isHidden
whenToUse: Need to see what apps are running
Checking if an app is open
